name: @feed/testing
description: Shared testing utilities and test suites for Feed

scripts.lint: cd ../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome check --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true --no-errors-on-unmatched packages/testing/package.json packages/testing/tsconfig.json packages/testing/tsconfig.typecheck.json packages/testing/src packages/testing/unit packages/testing/e2e
scripts.test:e2e: cd ../.. && rm -rf packages/testing/node_modules/@playwright packages/testing/node_modules/playwright && bunx playwright test --config packages/testing/playwright.config.ts
